Description: cellular response to DNA damage stimulus

Category: # - ID: GO term or KEGG pathway identifier
# - GeneRatio: Number of DEGs in term / Total DEGs analyzed
# - BgRatio: Number of genes in term / Background genes
# - pvalue: Raw p-value from enrichment test
# - geneID: Gene symbols of DEGs in the term (separated by /)
# - Count: Number of DEGs in the term
# - Direction: Up (enriched in upregulated genes) or Down (enriched in downregulated genes)
